title: TLTV Key Migration Document
description: Signed migration document declaring a channel has moved to a new identity (PROTOCOL.md section 5.14).

from.description: Channel ID of the old (migrating) channel. The signature is verified against this key.

to.description: Channel ID of the new channel.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for migration. Max 256 Unicode code points.

signature.description: Base58-encoded Ed25519 signature of the old channel's private key.
